Riften Guard: Gods, I hate night shift in this draughty old keep. Stone walls give me the creeps – feels like some dead king's ghost is gonna reach out and grab my tits. Serana: Oh sweetheart, if a ghost wanted to cop a feel, he'd have better luck with the tavern wenches. At least their tits aren't pressed flat by that ridiculous Stormcloak iron bra you call armor. Riften Guard: Better than flaunting my goods for every damn beggar like you vampy Imperial bitches. Whole point of this ugly uniform is so drunks can't tell if I'm a woman or a stray bear when I crack their skulls open. Serana: Please, darling. That steel mace of yours is compensating for something - I saw your little...

Serana: (adjusts her Pharaoh's bra with a smirk) You know, I heard the guards here in Riften have a very... (hands-on) approach to interrogations. Tell me, is it true you once made a bandit confess by riding him harder than a wild stallion while his friends watched?

Serana: So tell me, guard - how many awkward dungeon inspections have turned into spontaneous gangbangs with those sketchy Argonian dockworkers?
